freeze.reason: clean60 is not admitted yet; set frozen=true only after all 60 heldout cases, manifests, oracles, and prompts are frozen before the first clean run

selection_protocol.case_source_policy: Admit only new heldout cases that are not copied or renamed from dev40 or bpfix-empirical replay cases.
selection_protocol.admission_order_policy: Freeze the full 60-case split before running clean LLM evaluations; do not add or remove cases based on model outcomes.
selection_protocol.review_policy: Require independent review of every case's bug, oracle coverage, provenance, and clean-split eligibility.
selection_protocol.model_result_blinding_policy: Do not use raw, structured, source-only, or trimmed-raw model repair outcomes while admitting or excluding cases.
selection_protocol.near_duplicate_policy: Reject semantic near-duplicates of dev40 or already admitted clean60 cases even when exact file hashes differ.
